description_long: This is a commercial passenger airplane painted in a striking pink livery with the branding 'FDA' and 'Fuji Dream Airlines' prominently displayed on the fuselage. The aircraft features a streamlined fuselage, swept-back low-mounted wings with small winglets, and a conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer. The engines are mounted under each wing, typical of modern regional jets, and the landing gear appears to be a tricycle configuration. The cockpit is located at the forward end of the fuselage, with multiple windows visible for pilot visibility. The overall design is sleek and aerodynamic, suitable for short to medium-haul urban and regional flights.
description: A pink Fuji Dream Airlines passenger jet with swept low wings, underwing engines, and a conventional tail, designed for regional air travel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fuselage, pink livery, 'FDA' branding, and both wings with underwing engines.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the nose, cockpit windows, forward fuselage, and the symmetrical placement of the wings and engines.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other side of the fuselage, tail design, and wing structure with visible engine.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the tail assembly, horizontal stabilizers, and the trailing edges of the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with swept-back wings and small upturned winglets at the tips.
attribute_engine_type: Twin turbofan underwing engines, one mounted beneath each wing.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows for pilot visibility.
